name: GhostBroker Backend
description: GhostBroker dark-pool backend: Express REST API, WebSocket telemetry, Terminal 3 enclave bridge, settlement rails, and hosted-agent supervisor. The matching orchestrator, intent-lock janitor, and 10-minute settlement reconciler timer run in-process inside the web dyno.

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'GhostBroker backend deployed. Configure env vars via: heroku config:set KEY=value'

NODE_ENV.description: Node environment. Must be 'production' on Heroku so the T3 enclave startup check runs in strict mode.

PORT.description: HTTP server port. Heroku sets this automatically via the platform; do not override.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Pino log level (trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal). Defaults to info.

AUTH_SESSION_SECRET.description: 32+ char hex secret used to sign operator session JWTs and HMAC API-key lookup keys. Generate with: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"

CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of CORS origins the dashboard may call from. For Vercel, this is the production frontend URL plus any preview deployment pattern, e.g. https://ghostbroker.vercel.app,https://ghostbroker-*.vercel.app

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key. The backend uses this to bypass RLS for server-owned writes; treat as a secret.

T3N_API_KEY.description: Terminal 3 developer key from https://www.terminal3.io/claim-page. This is the T3N bearer API key (separate from the tenant signing key below).

T3N_ENV.description: T3 environment. 'testnet' for development; 'production' for billable mainnet.

T3_SANDBOX_TOKEN_ACCOUNT.description: Sandbox token account DID used by the T3 sandbox mode (see T3_ADK_ENV).

T3_MINIMUM_TOKEN_BALANCE.description: Minimum T3 token balance required at boot; the server refuses to start below this.

T3_PRIVATE_MAP_PREFIX.description: Namespace prefix for T3 private key/value maps. Use a unique value per deployment.

TENANT_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY.description: 0x-prefixed 64-hex secp256k1 private key the backend uses to sign server-minted delegation VCs. SEPARATE from T3N_API_KEY (rotating this invalidates every issued VC). In production, load from KMS/Vault/HSM and inject at boot. Omit to fall back to a CSPRNG-generated keypair persisted in the Supabase tenant_identities table.

T3_TENANT_DID.description: T3 tenant DID returned by the T3N handshake at boot. Required for production.

T3_MATCHING_CONTRACT_VERSION.description: Matching contract version the T3N adapter routes evaluate-match / seal-ticket / evaluate-pair calls to. Defaults to 0.7.0.

SETTLEMENT_RECONCILER_INTERVAL_MS.description: How often the settlement reconciler sweeps completed_trades for chain-state drift. Defaults to 600000 (10 minutes). Min 1000.

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.description: Sepolia RPC endpoint URL (Infura, Alchemy, or public RPC). REQUIRED — GhostBroker ships a single settlement rail (chain:sepolia:erc20) and refuses to boot without it.

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_RELAYER_PR.description: 0x-prefixed 64-hex private key for the relayer account that broadcasts settle() transactions. Must be funded with ~0.05 Sepolia ETH for gas. In production, load from KMS/Vault/HSM.

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_RELAYER_CO.description: Deployed GhostBrokerSettlementRelayer contract address on Sepolia. Deploy with: cd backend/contracts/relayer && forge build && node deploy.mjs

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_DEPOSIT_WA.description: 0x-prefixed 64-hex master seed used to deterministically derive each institution's server-owned Sepolia deposit wallet. In production, load from KMS/Vault/HSM.

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_WBTC_ADDRE.description: Canonical WBTC token address on Sepolia (default 0x29f2D40B0605204364af54EC677bD022dA425d03).

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_USDC_ADDRE.description: Canonical USDC token address on Sepolia (default 0x94a9D9AC8a22534E3FaCa9F4e7F2E2cf85d5E4C8).

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_CHAIN_ID.description: Sepolia chain id (11155111). Override only for Anvil forks (31337).

SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_CONFIRM_TI.description: Maximum seconds the chain rail will wait for tx confirmation before declaring dispatch failed. Defaults to 90.

SEPOLIA_WBTC_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.description: Sepolia WBTC contract address. Defaults match SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_WBTC_ADDRESS if unset.

SEPOLIA_USDC_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.description: Sepolia USDC contract address. Defaults match SETTLEMENT_RAIL_CHAIN_SEPOLIA_USDC_ADDRESS if unset.

ETHERSCAN_API_KEY.description: Etherscan API key for the Sepolia portfolio sync service. Optional; if unset, portfolio sync is disabled.

PORTFOLIO_SYNC_TOKEN.description: 32+ char token protecting the portfolio-sync webhook. Optional; sync is disabled if unset.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for the hosted LLM negotiator (highest priority in the fallback chain).

GEMINI_MODEL.description: Gemini model name. Defaults to gemini-3.1-flash-lite.

GEMINI_BASE_URL.description: Gemini API base URL (e.g. https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta). REQUIRED when GEMINI_API_KEY is set — the LLM clients no longer ship implicit defaults.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key (second priority in the hosted-agent fallback chain).

OPENAI_MODEL.description: OpenAI model name. Defaults to gpt-5-nano.

OPENAI_BASE_URL.description: OpenAI API base URL (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or your Azure OpenAI deployment URL). REQUIRED when OPENAI_API_KEY is set.

GROQ_API_KEY.description: Groq API key (third priority in the hosted-agent fallback chain).

GROQ_MODEL.description: Groq model name. Defaults to qwen/qwen3-32b.

GROQ_BASE_URL.description: Groq API base URL (e.g. https://api.groq.com/openai/v1). REQUIRED when GROQ_API_KEY is set.

LLM_PROVIDER_CHAIN.description: Comma-separated priority order for the hosted-agent LLM fallback chain. Defaults to gemini,openai,groq.

T3N_API_URL.description: T3N API URL override. Optional; the T3N client picks the right endpoint per T3N_ENV unless this is set.

AGENT_IDENTITY_CONFIG_PATH.description: Path (relative to backend CWD) where the agent identity JSON is persisted. Defaults to output/identities/agent_identity.json. On Heroku the file-backed store is wiped on every dyno cycle, so production should use the Supabase tenant_identities table (set TENANT_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY instead).

AGENTS_WORKSPACE_DIR.description: Workspace directory (relative to backend CWD) where the hosted-agent supervisor spawns the negotiator child processes. Defaults to the backend directory itself on Heroku.
